texto: Though my hair has grown grey now, and my sight dim, and my heart cold with years, and ennui, and disappointment, and treachery of friends, and yet I have but to lean back in my arm-chair and think, and those sweet figures comes rising up before me out of the past, with their smiles, and their kindnesses, and their bright tender eyes!
explicacao: Citação de William Makepeace Thackery sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Though my hair has grown grey now, and my sight dim, and my heart cold with years, and ennui, and…” articula amizade, aging, memories em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e amizade.
